reviews.comment:
No suelo dar opiniones, pero un destrato total. La chica florencia de muy mala gana y despues nos ignoraba, la otra chica se dio cuenta y nos atendio de maravilla, el lugar bien, lamentablemente nos llevamos una pesima experiencia

(Translated by Google)
I don't usually give reviews, but this was a complete disaster. The girl from Florencia was very reluctant and then ignored us. The other girl noticed and treated us wonderfully. The place itself was nice, but unfortunately, we had a terrible experience.
